statement: A steel beam (E = 200 GPa, I = 8×10⁻⁶ m⁴) of length 4 m is simply supported at both ends and carries a uniform load of 5 kN/m. Find the maximum bending stress and the deflection at the midpoint.
common_student_errors: Confusing reactions (solvable by statics) with bending stress and deflection (require beam theory: Euler-Bernoulli)
Attempting to find deflection using rigid body equations (which assume zero deformation)
Not recognizing that stress requires deformable body theory (mechanics of materials), not rigid body mechanics
